critique:
Critique:
Step 1 uses f_select_column(*), which retains all columns without altering the data. This is unnecessary but harmless and does not impede answering the question. Step 1 is correct.
Step 2 proceeds to compare events on October 6 and October 7 and defines “longer” by race name word count, an unsupported assumption given the ambiguous question. It does not apply any row-selection (e.g., f_select_row) to justify focusing on those dates, nor any operation to derive a “length” metric from the table. Step 2 is incorrect.
